headline: Edinburgh's trusted landscaping specialists — garden design, maintenance and hard landscaping, all year round.
subheadline: Edinburgh's most trusted landscaping and garden design company.
about_text: Green Edge designs, builds and maintains beautiful gardens across Edinburgh and the Lothians. From full garden redesigns and patio installations to regular lawn care and hedge trimming, our skilled team works year-round to keep your outdoor space immaculate.

services.title: Garden Design & Build
services.description: Full garden transformations — design consultation, planting plans, patio and pathway installation across Edinburgh and the Lothians.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Regular mowing, scarifying, aerating and fertilising programmes to keep Edinburgh lawns healthy and lush throughout the year.

services.title: Hard Landscaping & Driveways
services.description: Block paving, natural stone patios, retaining walls and drainage solutions for domestic and commercial properties.

reviews.name: Fiona R.
reviews.quote: Green Edge transformed our overgrown garden into something incredible. Couldn't be happier.
reviews.body: From the initial design consultation to the final planting, the Green Edge team were professional, creative and meticulous. Our garden went from a total mess to a showpiece in just two weeks.

reviews.name: Craig S.
reviews.quote: The new patio and pathway look stunning — excellent craftsmanship and on budget.
reviews.body: We had Green Edge install a full natural stone patio and gravel pathways. The team were tidy, efficient and the finish is absolutely first-class. They kept to the agreed budget and timeline without any issues.

reviews.name: Helen B.
reviews.quote: Our commercial grounds have never looked better. Reliable, professional team.
reviews.body: Green Edge maintain the grounds at our office park across the full year. They're always punctual, their seasonal planting is beautiful and they handle everything from lawn mowing to tree surgery. A genuinely reliable contractor.

faqs.question: Are your landscapers fully insured and qualified?
faqs.answer: Yes — all our team carry full public liability insurance and we hold professional memberships including the Association of Professional Landscapers.

faqs.question: Do you offer free garden design consultations in Edinburgh?
faqs.answer: We offer a free on-site consultation for all new garden design and build enquiries across Edinburgh and the Lothians.

faqs.question: Is your landscaping work guaranteed?
faqs.answer: All hard landscaping and build work carries a minimum 10-year structural guarantee — in writing, every time.

differentiators: All landscapers carry full public liability insurance and hold professional memberships with the APL.
We offer free on-site design consultations across Edinburgh and the Lothians — no obligation.
Every project includes a detailed design plan and plant schedule before any work begins.
You receive a full written quote before work starts. Our price is fixed — no surprise additions.
All hard landscaping work carries a minimum 10-year structural guarantee with free call-back if issues arise.
Full project documentation and aftercare guide provided on completion — ideal for property managers and developers.
service_area_text: Edinburgh, Midlothian, East Lothian, West Lothian and surrounding Scottish Borders areas.

metadata.title: Green Edge | Landscapers Edinburgh
metadata.description: Green Edge provides expert garden design, hard landscaping and year-round maintenance across Edinburgh and the Lothians. Free consultations, 10-year guarantees.
